item.title:
livedarts: Live Darts @livedarts · 1h "𝙒𝙝𝙚𝙣 𝙄’𝙢 𝙞𝙣 𝙩𝙝𝙖𝙩 𝙯𝙤𝙣𝙚 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙥𝙡𝙖𝙮𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙜𝙤𝙤𝙙, 𝙄 𝙘𝙤𝙪𝙡𝙙 𝙥𝙡𝙖𝙮 𝙖𝙡𝙡 𝙙𝙖𝙮 𝙡𝙞𝙠𝙚 𝙩𝙝𝙖𝙩."
Recap & reaction a
item.description:
Live Darts @livedarts · 1h "𝙒𝙝𝙚𝙣 𝙄’𝙢 𝙞𝙣 𝙩𝙝𝙖𝙩 𝙯𝙤𝙣𝙚 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙥𝙡𝙖𝙮𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙜𝙤𝙤𝙙, 𝙄 𝙘𝙤𝙪𝙡𝙙 𝙥𝙡𝙖𝙮 𝙖𝙡𝙡 𝙙𝙖𝙮 𝙡𝙞𝙠𝙚 𝙩𝙝𝙖𝙩."
Recap & reaction as Nijman adds a fantastic fourth ranking title of the season De live-darts.com 2 681

item.title: philhaigh_: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 1h 'Well, I couldn't win it when I was in my prime, so I can't see me winning it, obviously.'
item.description:
Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 1h 'Well, I couldn't win it when I was in my prime, so I can't see me winning it, obviously.'
Admirable honesty from Matthew Stevens after booking a Crucible return.
He talks upsets and motivation De metro.co.uk 1 6 324

item.title: Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 1h Congratulations to everyone involved in DTF St Louis. What a bold and brilliant show.
item.description: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 1h Congratulations to everyone involved in DTF St Louis. What a bold and brilliant show. Absolute maverick production. Top level acting and inspired storylines. If you haven't watched, you really should give it a go. 1 3 149

item.title: Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 13 abr. One of the great flat jockeys, Ryan Moore, was on my Ryanair flight from Dublin.
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 13 abr. One of the great flat jockeys, Ryan Moore, was on my Ryanair flight from Dublin. No heirs and graces there.
I asked Ryan for his biggest hope for this year. He told me: 'Arsenal to win the title.'
He grew up a Brighton fan, but his nan took him to Highbury in early Wenger days. 9 13 237 39 mil

item.title: Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 1h En respuesta a @Nick_Metcalfe Do I have a SoundCloud? Seriously, do I still have to p
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 1h En respuesta a @Nick_Metcalfe Do I have a SoundCloud? Seriously, do I still have to put up with these tiresome questions?
Yes I have a bloody SoundCloud. Jeez.
I talk a lot of snooker and sometimes post examples on there. Like this on Radio Snooker on Ronnie O'Sullivan's 153 break: soundcloud.com Radio Snooker with Nick Metcalfe: Ronnie O'Sullivan makes break of... Ronnie O'Sullivan made the highest break ever in pro snooker, a 16-red break of 153 at the World Open in Yushan. Here is my verdict on a snooker moment to remember on my Radio Snooker service. 1 334

item.title: Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 2h I have to say I concur with this. I know this place has its dark elements, and the own
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 2h I have to say I concur with this. I know this place has its dark elements, and the owner is odious. But my corner has been a total delight. We've just nattered away about rattlers, old telly and snooker for nigh on two decades. I've also made many memorable friends too.
#Twitter Cita GaryOnCue @GaryOnCue · 2h I must be hugely lucky. So many people slating X, even calling it a cesspit
It’s been pretty much nothing but a joy and good to me. A fantastic, snooker curated news feed and a place I’ve made tons of friends 7 477
